articles.title: Rozgar Mela: Joshi gives 150 letters in Hubballi, 51k nationwide
articles.description: Union Minister Pralhad Joshi distributed 150 appointment letters in Hubballi as part of the Rozgar Mela. PM Modi led the nationwide drive, distributing 51,000 letters and hailing the growth of self-employment and India's startup ecosystem.

articles.title: 'We have many shared interests': Rubio highlights growing India-US convergence; opens up on negotiations with Iran
articles.description: Rubio's remarks came as he highlighted growing cooperation between New Delhi and Washington, particularly within the framework of the Quad grouping

articles.title: CSIR-IIIM hosts Prof Serge Mignani to boost drug discovery research
articles.description: CSIR-IIIM Jammu hosted scientist Prof Serge Mignani for a collaborative meeting to advance partnerships in drug discovery. Discussions focused on anti-TB, oncology, and inflammation research, aiming to boost Indo-French scientific cooperation.

articles.title: Why Are Aiden Markram And Mitchell Marsh Not Playing Today's LSG Vs PBKS IPL 2026 Match?
articles.description: Aiden Markram leaves LSG mid season for birth of his first child, Mitchell Marsh exits before final league game to lead Australia in Pakistan ODI series

articles.title: US-India relationship foundational for Washington's strategy: Rubio
articles.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio called the US-India relationship a 'foundational element' of Washington's strategy. During his visit, he reaffirmed ties, hinted at new announcements, and is set to meet PM Modi and EAM Jaishankar to discuss key issues.

articles.title: Assam's growth: Sarma meets FM, inaugurates Syama Prasad flyover
articles.description: Assam CM Himanta Biswa Sarma met Union FM Nirmala Sitharaman to discuss the state's development. He also inaugurated the ₹376 crore Dr. Syama Prasad Mookerjee Flyover in Guwahati and took oath for his 6th term as MLA.

articles.title: Nagarjuna marks 40 years in cinema, cherishes May 23 memories
articles.description: Superstar Nagarjuna Akkineni cherishes May 23, the release date of his debut film 'Vikram' and his father ANR's last film 'Manam'. He marked 40 years in cinema with a heartfelt note, with son Naga Chaitanya also paying tribute.

articles.title: Char Dham Yatra: Uttarakhand CS reviews arrangements for pilgrims
articles.description: Uttarakhand Chief Secretary Anand Bardhan reviewed Char Dham Yatra arrangements, directing DMs to streamline the pilgrimage. He suggested night darshan for crowds and ordered monsoon preparedness, including evacuation plans and health screenings.

articles.title: MI coach Jayawardene defends Hardik Pandya's on-field frustrations
articles.description: MI head coach Mahela Jayawardene addressed the team's frustrating IPL season, noting captain Hardik Pandya's struggles with injury and on-field anger. He said the team failed to execute despite having the talent and squad to perform well.

articles.title: MDMK's Vaiko condemns Coimbatore girl's murder, demands strict action
articles.description: MDMK chief Vaiko condemned the abduction and murder of a 10-year-old girl in Coimbatore. Demanding strict action, he called for a law mandating life imprisonment for such crimes and urged the state government to ensure the safety of women and children.

articles.title: What does the new US immigration laws mean for Indians?
articles.description: US Green Card Rule 2026: The Trump administration ends in-country adjustment of status. Learn how it impacts Indian H-1B holders, students, and families.

articles.title: Estonia to be India's gateway to northern Europe after EU FTA: Indian envoy
articles.description: Estonia can be the gateway to northern European markets for India once the FTA with the European Union comes into effect, Indian Ambassador Ashish Sinha has said, asserting that the bilateral relationship is on an upswing. In an interview with PTI, Sinha said there is a robust base of existing trade to be used as a "springboard" for further engagement between India and Estonia when the India-EU free trade agreement comes into force. The Indian Ambassador to Estonia asserted that the overall bilateral relationship is going from strength to strength and getting stronger. "Going forward, with the India-EU FTA, there will be far more engagement of the small and medium-sized industries, and the dairy and agriculture products from Estonia will find their market in India. For India, we will have Estonia as a gateway to northern Europe," Sinha told PTI. Noting that Estonia also offers e-residency, Sinha said many of the Indian businessmen and high-value industrialists have taken Estonia's

articles.title: Marco Rubio says new US green card policy ‘not about India’, cites global immigration overhaul
articles.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio stated that a new green card policy is a global immigration overhaul, not specifically targeting India. He explained the reform addresses a past migration crisis and abuses of the system, aiming for a more efficient process for applicants in the long run.

articles.title: Twisha Sharma visited salon for head massage hours before alleged suicide, CCTV footage surfaces
articles.description: Twisha Sharma found hanging at her marital home in Bhopal, days after reportedly pleading with her mother to be taken home, has sparked dowry harassment allegations. Her husband, now arrested, and mother-in-law are accused. The family disputes claims of the deceased's mental health issues, pointing to injuries suggesting foul play.

articles.title: Strategic compact: India & Cyprus look to secure trade routes, supply chains, and regional security against the backdrop of a China-Turkey-Pakistan axis
articles.description: India and Cyprus elevated their relationship to a strategic partnership, aiming to boost bilateral investments in sectors like defense and tourism. This move strengthens Cyprus's defense capabilities and positions it as a key European entry point for the India-Middle East-Europe Economic Corridor, countering regional geopolitical challenges.

articles.description: They walked among the dinosaurs. Now, they are in danger. There may be only 5,000 Himalayan salamanders left in the wild in India, Subba says.

articles.title: Centre releases draft rules for VB-GRAM G Act, 2025; invites public consultation ahead of July 1 rollout
articles.description: The Centre has released draft rules for the VB-GRAM G Act, 2025. Public consultation is now open for feedback. This is a crucial step before the Act's scheduled rollout on July 1. The government aims for a smooth implementation. More details on the Act's provisions will follow the consultation period.

articles.title: WEATHER ALERT: Severe Heatwave Grips Bihar and North India, Heat Alert Issued in 14 Districts
articles.description: A severe heatwave is affecting Bihar and several parts of North India, with the India Meteorological Department issuing a yellow alert for 14 districts, including Patna, Ara, and nearby regions. Temperatures are expected to rise up to 45°C, making outdoor conditions dangerous and increasing the risk of heatstroke. Authorities have advised people to avoid going outside between 12 PM and 4 PM unless necessary. The extreme heat has disrupted normal life, with deserted streets and reduced activity in major cities. Meanwhile, similar conditions are being reported across other northern states as the heatwave intensifies. The impact is also visible in zoos, where special arrangements like water sprinklers, coolers, and shaded enclosures have been set up to protect animals from the harsh weather.

articles.title: 'Poor thing': Iran mocks Donald Trump as viral buffalo resembling him loses appetite
articles.description: Iran's official account in Russia shared a viral video of a Bangladeshi albino buffalo resembling Donald Trump, claiming the animal lost its appetite due to the comparison amid ongoing US-Iran conflict. The buffalo, named 'Donald Trump', has become a local attraction ahead of Eid al-Adha festivities.

articles.title: BRS leader found dead in gunny bag in Telangana's Suryapet
articles.description: A local BRS leader, Chinthalapadi Madhu, was discovered deceased inside a gunny bag near Yerkaram stage in Suryapet district. Police suspect foul play, with the 42-year-old reportedly murdered before his body was abandoned. Madhu had a prior murder case from 2008. Authorities are investigating and searching for the perpetrators.

articles.title: Donna Kelce’s stunning net worth rise highlights how the NFL’s favorite mom became a household celebrity icon
articles.description: Donna Kelce’s transformation from NFL parent to national media personality has significantly boosted her public profile and earnings. With endorsement deals, television appearances, and growing cultural relevance tied to the Kelce family’s popularity, her estimated net worth has reportedly surpassed $3 million by 2026. Travis Kelce’s relationship with Taylor Swift has added another layer of visibility, while Donna’s grounded public image continues to resonate with fans across both sports and entertainment audiences.

articles.title: 'Athiradi' box office collection day 9: Basil Joseph film slows amid 'Drishyam 3' wave; Worldwide total reaches Rs 56.94 Cr
articles.description: 'Drishyam 3' has impacted 'Athiradi's' box office, causing a noticeable slowdown in its second week. Despite a 17.6% drop on its ninth day, the comedy entertainer starring Tovino Thomas and Basil Joseph maintains decent occupancy. Overseas collections remain strong, pushing the film's worldwide gross to Rs 56.94 crore.
